text:
The goal is to navigate to a traffic cone. I'm currently at distance=5219 cm and bearing=-173 degrees. The bearing is -173 degrees, which is almost directly behind me (180 degrees would be directly behind). I need to turn around to face the goal.

Since I don't know the bearing sign convention yet, I should perform a test turn to understand how the bearing changes. Let me start by turning left to see how the bearing value changes. This will help me calibrate the bearing sign convention as per skill #6.

Actually, looking at the bearing of -173 degrees, this is very close to 180 degrees (or -180 degrees), which means the goal is almost directly behind me. I need to turn around. Let me start with a TURN_LEFT to see how the bearing changes and establish the sign convention.
</think>

<tool_call>
<function=TURN_LEFT>
</function>
</tool_call>
